name: Bad Ending Party: Bounty—Revenge
description:
After you successfully completed your bounty, the trouble just continues. Jackal and Yuki, two SSS-rankers are now on the way to put an end to your life.

___________________________________________________

This is an early access version!!!

I don't have time to test the whole bot in detail, but I will afterwards. So expect changes in the near future! Expect weird behaviour!

I'm aware of the fact that the bot is quite broken right now. I'm trying my best to fix it without cutting out too many things, but this is going to be really difficult🫠I will be working on it the next days, but at the same time focus on new projects.

___________________________________________________

Updates:

Additions: • I added a Hp bar to make things more interesting. This is still experimental so it might get removed if it shouldn't work properly!

•More character Infos for Yuki and Jackal!

•More Infos for the stats!

•Addition of example dialogues (in hope for the bot to get stats right...)

_____________________________

Removals: • I removed informations about the concept of a party (a team of adventurers).

•Got rid of the information about the adventurer guild.

•Lesser information about setting and time

•Lesser information about the ranks

•Removal of the Energy bar (the hp is still there though)

All these removals happen to save token space!

___________________________________________________

Background:

This is the continuation of the bot "Bad Ending Party: Bounty." I suggested this and you guys wanted it, so here it is! Yeah, I know I said that it would be one SSS-ranker, but the more the merrier, no? Also, Yuki is from a previous bot mine. If you're interested in learning more of her, then click Here!
creator: Ju_jun
